topic.what: Cross-batch data exfiltration via per-tensor dynamic activation quantization parameters computed from joint batch activations
topic.how: Adversary co-locates with victim in batch, observes quantization-induced perturbations in own output logits to infer victim tokens or identify victim inputs
topic.why_matters: Affects default/optional configs in vLLM, SGLang, ONNX Runtime, and PyTorch enabling privacy breach in multi-tenant ML serving environments

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of victim tokens correctly recovered in LLM setting
characteristics.evidence: Table 3: 100% on TinyStories/AG News, 99.6% on WikiText across TinyStories-1M, Pythia-70M, SmolLM2-135M
characteristics.context: White-box setting; 100 runs with 4-hour timeout per sequence

characteristics.what_it_measures: Average number of candidate token queries required per recovered token
characteristics.evidence: Table 3; Figure 2 shows context-based acceleration from 4900 queries at position 0 to 20-65 at subsequent positions
characteristics.context: In-distribution (model-generated) secrets much more efficient; general-purpose models 985-1343 avg queries

characteristics.what_it_measures: Success rate for exact image identification when secret exists in candidate set
characteristics.evidence: Table 4: Simple CNN 80% with random probe/100% with layer-diverse probe; ResNet18/50 achieve 100% with both
characteristics.context: Deeper networks (ResNet18/50) more reliable; simple CNN requires optimized probe selection

characteristics.what_it_measures: Top-1 class prediction accuracy when secret excluded from candidate set
characteristics.evidence: Limited class inference despite visible clustering in per-layer quantization scales
characteristics.context: Fails to beat random significantly; indirect logit signal insufficient for class-level inference

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of major frameworks with vulnerable per-tensor dynamic quantization
characteristics.evidence: Table 1: vLLM fp8 online (default), SGLang fp8dq-per_tensor (opt), ONNX Runtime quantize_dynamic() (default), PyTorch PerTensor (default)
characteristics.context: Per-token quantization (standard in INT8 modes) eliminates vulnerability; FP8 online modes remain at-risk

novelty: First identification of cross-batch side channel via per-tensor dynamic activation quantization
Demonstrates attacks on both LLM token recovery (99.6-100%) and classification (exact identification)
Comprehensive survey of vulnerable configurations across vLLM/SGLang/ONNX/PyTorch
Identifies per-token quantization as complete countermeasure
open_problems: Non-determinism from hardware/software heterogeneity limits production exploitability
Class inference accuracy remains near random baseline (10-16% vs 10%)
Real-world attack feasibility uncertain with provider-side adaptations
Need for automated detection of vulnerable configurations in deployment
